title: eragrostis olivacea
intro: Eragrostis olivacea, also known as olive grass or olive love grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Eragrostis olivacea include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, Eragrostis olivacea is often used as a tea or infused in hot water to harness its medicinal properties, and it can also be dried and powdered for use in capsules or tinctures.
